title: CI include BEM1284 trace
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Create file .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml with content name: governance-validation-ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-foundation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Run foundation validator if present
        run: |
          if [ -f governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py ]; then python governance/validators/validate_foundation_all.py; else echo 'validate_foundation_all.py missing - skipped until implemented'; fi
      - name: Run no-truncated-python validator
        run: python governance/validators/validate_no_truncated_python.py
      - name: Run SSOT duplicate validator
        run: python governance/validators/validate_ssot_no_duplicates.py
      - name: Run readiness levels validator
        run: python governance/validators/validate_readiness_levels.py
      - name: Run BEM-1284 minimal local E2E runner
        run: python governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py
      - name: Validate BEM-1284 last_run trace
        run: python governance/validators/validate_last_run_real_trace.py

Create file governance/state/tz5_ci_bem1284_trace_status.json with content {"stage":"TZ-5","status":"ci_runs_bem1284_and_trace_validator","workflow":".github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml","release_pass":false,"next_action":"RM aggregate roadmap status"}
